news.t: How To Invest In Ukraine: Top Ukrainian Stocks On Global Markets

holdings.infoBox: TLTE is an equity ETF with a total of 3074 individual holdings. The top holdings are Samsung Electronics stock at 6.82%, Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company at 6.53%, SK hynix at 5.13%, Tencent Holdings at 1.29%, and Cash at 1.03%.

overview.description: The FlexShares Morningstar Emerging Markets Factor Tilt Index Fund (TLTE) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund tracks an index of equities from emerging market countries. The index underweights large-cap and growth stocks in favor of small-cap and value stocks. TLTE was launched on Sep 28, 2012 and is issued by FlexShares.

data.title: How To Invest In Ukraine: Top Ukrainian Stocks On Global Markets
data.text: Companies like Airbnb have stepped up by offering shelter for 100,000 Ukrainians who needed refuge. The Russian invasion has affected markets around the globe, leading to market volatility.
